title: The Sign of the Seven Sins
author: William Le Queux
description: In the glittering casinos of Monte Carlo, where white and gold façades hide deadly secrets, socialite Carmela Rosselli becomes entangled in a murder mystery that leads from luxury hotels to illicit gambling dens. When her companion is found dead with mysterious marks on his throat, Carmela must navigate a world of poisoned weapons, dangerous conspiracies, and forbidden love to uncover the truth—before she becomes the next victim in a game where the stakes are life and death.

reviews.comment: Fascinating glimpse into early 20th century Europe.
